Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Teens sue xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  2. Leanstral: Open-source code agent designed for Lean 4 253 upvotes, 46 comments
  3. Show HN: Trackm, a personal finance web app 11 upvotes, 0 comments
  4. My Journey to a reliable and enjoyable locally hosted voice assistant (2025) 307 upvotes, 92 comments
  5. Lazycut: A simple terminal video trimmer using FFmpeg 144 upvotes, 47 comments
  6. Meta’s renewed commitment to jemalloc 320 upvotes, 130 comments
  7. The “small web” is bigger than you might think 295 upvotes, 129 comments
  8. Why I love FreeBSD 336 upvotes, 156 comments
  9. Corruption erodes social trust more in democracies than in autocracies 634 upvotes, 328 comments
  10. US SEC preparing to scrap quarterly reporting requirement 48 upvotes, 18 comments
  11. Lies I was told about collaborative editing, Part 2: Why we don't use Yjs 192 upvotes, 97 comments
  12. On The Need For Understanding 76 upvotes, 33 comments
  13. Home Assistant waters my plants 244 upvotes, 130 comments
  14. Language Model Teams as Distrbuted Systems 64 upvotes, 28 comments
  15. Polymarket gamblers threaten to kill me over Iran missile story 1293 upvotes, 860 comments
  16. Show HN: Claude Code skills that build complete Godot games 141 upvotes, 79 comments
  17. Kona EV Hacking 115 upvotes, 65 comments
  18. Show HN: Thermal Receipt Printers – Markdown and Web UI 19 upvotes, 6 comments
  19. In space, no one can hear you kernel panic 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  20. US commercial insurers pay 254% of Medicare for the same hospital procedures 163 upvotes, 102 comments
  21. Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI 117 upvotes, 76 comments
  22. US Job Market Visualizer 393 upvotes, 308 comments
  23. Show HN: Oxyde – Pydantic-native async ORM with a Rust core 45 upvotes, 27 comments
  24. Launch HN: Voygr (YC W26) – A better maps API for agents and AI apps 63 upvotes, 42 comments
  25. Starlink Mini as a failover 181 upvotes, 153 comments
  26. Apideck CLI – An AI-agent interface with much lower context consumption than MCP 116 upvotes, 103 comments
  27. The bureaucracy blocking the chance at a cure 84 upvotes, 113 comments
  28. AirPods Max 2 183 upvotes, 353 comments
  29. Cert Authorities Check for DNSSEC from Today 83 upvotes, 187 comments
